title: Blue's QuickEquip
description: Allows players to toggle their equipped armor on and off using customizable keybinds.
body:
Things that this mod does:
1. Adds keybinds to toggle armor pieces off and on
2. That is literally it lol

### **DISCLAIMER: THIS MOD MAY TRIGGER ANTICHEATS. MAKE SURE YOU HAVE PERMISSION TO USE IT ON SERVERS!**

This mod is a very simple one. When you press the keybind that you set up, it will either put on or take off the corresponding armor piece. Designed to help PvPers help mend their armor, but it can be useful in many other situations. The mod helps you organize and keep track of your inventory. For now it only uses diamond and netherite pieces of armor.

Please note that this mod **does not consider your hotbar as part of your inventory**.

-Blueishberry
